name: Crustless Cheddar Carrot Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Place carrots in a saucepan with about 1-inch of cold water; bring to boil.
3. Cover and remove from heat; set aside for 5 minutes, then drain thoroughly.
4. Combine milk, eggs, scallions, and seasoning until blended.
5. Stir in cooked carrots and cheese. Spray a 9-inch quiche dish or pie plate with nonstick cooking spray. Pour carrot mixture into dish.
6. Place dish in large baking pan and set on oven rack.
7. Add hot water to baking pan to within 1/2-inch of top of quiche dish. Bake 30 to 35 minutes, until set.
8. Makes 4 servings, 250 calories per serving.
